roa.docketEntryComment: /INTC/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/DEF:IS NO LONGER REQUIRED TO BE ONELECTRONIC MONITORING/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:CASE WAS DISMISSED ON 08-14-19/

/CAL: JURY TRIAL/INTC/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,17006325,/

/CAL:TO JOIN #19011034/INTC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT ISTO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & DEFT'S BAIL MOTION/INTC/WIT SWORN:KATHERINE ROTHSCHIELD/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1-PHOTO OF A DAMAGED WINDOW/EXHMA:DEFENSE A- USBDRIVE WITH SURVEILLANCE VIDEO/ARG&SUB/X:DEFENDANT'S BAIL MOTION IS GRANTED,/BAIL:10000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:BASED ON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT REDUCES COUNT 2 TO 594(B)(2)(A)PC, MISDEMEANOR,/X:BASEDON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT ADDS COUNT 3- 484(A),490,5PC,MISDEMEANOR TO CONFORM TO PROOF,/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, AREORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDTR: 09-09-19//CONTD:JOIN #19011034 ON 08-12-19 IN M17/CONTD:JURY TRIAL ON 08-27-19 IN M17/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:08-12-19/987,2/BAIL:30,000/SAORD/SAI:KATHERINE ROTHSCHILD/SAORD4:100 YARDS/SA2:3400 CESAR CHAVEZ, SF/  /CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
